revision.text:
[[ja:衝角付冑]] [[File:久津川車塚古墳出土 衝角付冑 (J-13634).JPG|thumb|Horned helmet with triangular plate Lamellar armour (Excavated from {{ill|Kutsukawa Kurazuka Kofun|ja|久津川車塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kutsukawa Kurazuka Kofun|1=Kutsukawa Kurumazuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11369464}}, {{ill|Jōyō, Kyoto|en|Jōyō, Kyoto|qid=Q817276|lt=Jōyō City|1=Jōyō, Kyoto}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Owned by the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|en|Tokyo National Museum|qid=Q653433|lt=Tokyo National Museum|1=Tokyo National Museum}})]] '''Horned Helmet''' (衝角付冑, Shōkakutsuki Kabuto) is a type of {{ill|helmet|ja|冑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/helmet|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兜|1=Kabuto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1720878}} manufactured and used during the mid-[[Kofun period]] in Japan.{{Refnest|group=note|The term "katchū" (armor) in the Kofun period is typically written as "甲" (armor) and "冑" (helmet) instead of "鎧" and "兜" due to archaeological convention.}} It is one of the representative types of {{ill|Japanese armour|en|Japanese armour|qid=Q3671179|lt=armor|1=Japanese armour}} unearthed as grave goods from {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}}. From the late {{ill|4th century|en|4th century|qid=Q8099|lt=4th century|1=4th century}} to the {{ill|7th century|en|7th century|qid=Q8089|lt=7th century|1=7th century}}, it was used in conjunction with {{ill|Tankō|en|Tankō|qid=Q1687003|lt=Tankō|1=Tankō}} (plate armor) or {{ill|Lamellar armour|lt=Lamellar armour|lt=Keikō (lamellar armour)|ja|挂甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lamellar armour|1=keikō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11077681}} (Lamellar armour).{{Sfn|Suenaga|1944}}{{Refnest|group=note|While the terms "tankō" and "Lamellar armour|lt=Lamellar armour|lt=Keikō (lamellar armour)" are often applied to Kofun-period armor based on their appearance in [[Nara period|Nara]] and [[Heian period]] texts, differences in structure and design between these and Kofun-period armor have led some scholars to propose using "plate armor" and "Lamellar armour" instead.{{Sfn|Hashimoto|2009|pp=27–30}}}} == Overview == The name "horned helmet" (衝角付冑) derives from the shape of the main body (bowl), which is not a perfect hemisphere but protrudes forward at the front (forehead area), resembling the "ram" (衝角, shōkaku) fitted on the prow of a {{ill|warship|en|warship|qid=Q2031121|lt=warship|1=Warship}}.{{Sfn|Suenaga|1944}} While typically made of iron, some examples were crafted with gilt bronze plating over iron, and an unusual leather version was found at {{ill|Nanakunoyama Kofun|ja|七観山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanakunoyama Kofun|qq=}} in {{ill|Sakai|en|Sakai|qid=Q193428|lt=Sakai City|1=Sakai}}, Osaka Prefecture.{{Sfn|Sakai City Cultural Tourism Bureau|2013|pp=93–94}}{{Sfn|Nanakunoyama Kofun Research Group|2014|pp=67–71}} Horned helmets emerged in the late 4th century (early middle Kofun period), succeeding "lamellar leather helmets" seen in examples like the {{ill|Yukinoyama Kofun|en|Yukinoyama Kofun|qid=Q11659952|lt=Yukinoyama Kofun|1=Yukinoyama Kofun}} in {{ill|Ōmihachiman|en|Ōmihachiman|qid=Q385461|lt=Ōmihachiman|1=Ōmihachiman}}, Shiga Prefecture. === Structure === * '''Bowl (鉢, hachi):''' The bowl is constructed using two U-shaped iron plates (waist plate and body plate) curved from the rear (occipital side), arranged vertically and joined at the front. A spade-shaped plate called a "cover plate" (伏板, fukuban) is affixed to cover the forehead and top. Small triangular plates (地板, chiban), lamellar plates, or iron strips are attached inside for reinforcement. Some examples feature three tubular protrusions ("three-tailed metal," 三尾鉄, sanbite) on the top for attaching feathers. * '''Neck guard (錣, shikoro):''' A band of iron plates hung from the back and lower sides to protect the neck. Variations include single wide bands, multiple overlapping bands, or small iron plates strung together with leather cords. * '''Ram plate (衝角底板, shōkaku sokoita):''' A plate used to fill the gap between the head and the protruding ram-like forehead. * '''Forehead guard (竪眉庇, tate mabizashi):''' A band of iron attached to the ram plate to cover and protect the wearer’s forehead. === Manufacturing Techniques === Initially, during the early Kofun period, plates were joined using leather cords threaded through holes (leather-lacing technique). By the mid-Kofun period (5th century), iron rivets replaced leather cords, and this riveting technique became widespread. These changes parallel those in the development of {{ill|Tankō|en|Tankō|qid=Q1687003|lt=Tankō|1=Tankō}} (plate armor), suggesting centralized control of armor production by the {{ill|Yamato Kingship|en|Yamato Kingship|qid=Q2658252|lt=Yamato polity|1=Yamato Kingship}}, which distributed armor sets to local chiefs buried in kofun. == Types == Horned helmets are broadly categorized based on manufacturing techniques and structural features, though further subdivisions are possible.{{Sfn|Sakaguchi|2001}}{{Sfn|Tanaka|2003}} * '''Triangular-Plate Leather-Laced Horned Helmet:''' The earliest type, using triangular plates joined with leather lacing. * '''Triangular-Plate Riveted Horned Helmet:''' Features triangular plates joined with rivets. * '''Vertical-Riveted Horned Helmet:''' Employs vertical strips of iron riveted together. * '''Small-Plate Riveted Horned Helmet:''' Uses smaller iron plates (lamellae) riveted together. * '''Horizontal-Plate Riveted Horned Helmet:''' Later designs with horizontally arranged plates, appearing after the mid-Kofun period. * '''Wide-Vertical Plate Riveted Horned Helmet:''' A late Kofun period type featuring wide vertical plates, which may have influenced the development of later helmets like the {{ill|hoshi kabuto|ja|星兜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hoshi kabuto|1=hoshi kabuto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1630364}}. == Gallery == === Leather-Laced Horned Helmets === 桜ヶ丘古墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Sakuragaoka Kofun|ja|桜ヶ丘古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakuragaoka Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture. Exhibited at the Matsumoto City Archaeological Museum.}} 堂山1号墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Doyama Kofun|ja|堂山古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doyama Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Daito City, Osaka Prefecture. Exhibited at the Chikatsu-Asuka Museum.}} 恵解山2号墳出土 衝角付冑 (J-38334-13).JPG|Horned helmet from Igenoyama Kofun No. 2
{{small|Tokushima City, Tokushima Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} 大塚山古墳 (堺市) 三角板革綴衝角付冑-1.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Mozu Otsukayama Kofun|ja|百舌鳥大塚山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu Otsukayama Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Sakai City, Osaka Prefecture. Exhibited at the Sakai City Museum.}} 大塚山古墳 (堺市) 三角板革綴衝角付冑-2.JPG|Horned helmet from Mozu Otsukayama Kofun
{{small|Sakai City, Osaka Prefecture. Exhibited at the Sakai City Museum.}} 茶すり山古墳 三角板革綴衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Chasuriyama Kofun|en|Chasuriyama Kofun|qid=Q103903111|lt=Chasuriyama Kofun|1=Chasuriyama Kofun}}
{{small|Asago City, Hyōgo Prefecture. Photographed during a special exhibition at the Hyōgo Prefectural Museum of Archaeology.}} ニゴレ古墳 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Nigore Kofun|ja|ニゴレ古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigore Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Kyotango City, Kyoto Prefecture. Exhibited at the Kyoto University Museum.}} === Riveted Horned Helmets === 雲部車塚古墳 三角板鋲留異形衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Kumbe Kurazuka Kofun|ja|雲部車塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumbe Kurazuka Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture. From the Kyoto University Archaeology Laboratory collection, photographed during a special exhibition at the Hyōgo Prefectural Museum of Archaeology.}} 茶すり山古墳 竪矧板鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Chasuriyama Kofun|en|Chasuriyama Kofun|qid=Q103903111|lt=Chasuriyama Kofun|1=Chasuriyama Kofun}}
{{small|Asago City, Hyōgo Prefecture. Photographed during a special exhibition at the Hyōgo Prefectural Museum of Archaeology.}} 鶴山古墳 (太田市) 出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Tsuru Kofun|ja|鶴山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuru Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Ota City, Gunma Prefecture. Exhibited at the Gunma Prefectural Museum.}} 布野台古墳出土 小札鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from Funodai Kofun
{{small|Katori City, Chiba Prefecture. Exhibited at the Katori City Cultural Heritage Preservation Museum.}} 久津川車塚古墳出土 鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Kutsukawa Kurazuka Kofun|ja|久津川車塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kutsukawa Kurazuka Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Joyo City, Kyoto Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tenri University Sankokan Museum.}} 御獅子塚古墳第1主体部出土 小札鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Goshishizuka Kofun|ja|御獅子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goshishizuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{small|Toyonaka City, Osaka Prefecture. Exhibited at the Toyonaka Municipal Folk Museum.}} 雲部車塚古墳 小札鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from Kumbe Kurazuka Kofun
{{small|Tanba-Sasayama City, Hyōgo Prefecture. From the Kyoto University Archaeology Laboratory collection, photographed during a special exhibition at the Hyōgo Prefectural Museum of Archaeology.}} 円照寺墓山1号墳出土 小札鋲留衝角付冑 (J-21185).JPG|Horned helmet from Enshoji Bokuzan Kofun No. 1
{{small|Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} 新沢281号墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Niizawa Senchū Kofun No. 281|ja|新沢千塚281号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niizawa Senchū Kofun No. 281|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{small|Kashihara City, Nara Prefecture. Exhibited at the Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute Museum.}} 石坂古墳出土 衝角付冑 (J-13736).JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Ishizaka Kofun|ja|石坂古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishizaka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{small|Ebino City, Miyazaki Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} 三昧塚古墳 (行方市) 出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Sanmaizuka Kofun (Namegata)|ja|三昧塚古墳 (行方市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanmaizuka Kofun (Namegata)|qq=}}
{{small|Namegata City, Ibaraki Prefecture. Exhibited at the Meiji University Museum.}} 大日塚古墳出土 衝角付冑 (J-39358-1).JPG|Horned helmet from Dainichizuka Kofun
{{small|Namegata City, Ibaraki Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} 益子天王塚古墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Mashiko Tennōzuka Kofun|ja|益子天王塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mashiko Tennōzuka Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Mashiko Town, Tochigi Prefecture. Exhibited at the Aizu Yaichi Memorial Museum, Waseda University.}} 永明寺古墳出土 横矧板鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Eimeiji Kofun|ja|永明寺古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eimeiji Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Hanyu City, Saitama Prefecture. Exhibited at the Saitama Prefectural Museum of History and Folklore.}} 法皇塚古墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Hōōzuka Kofun|ja|法皇塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōōzuka Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. Exhibited at the Ichikawa Archaeological Museum.}} 狐山古墳 (加賀市) 出土 横矧板鋲留衝角付冑 (J-21452).JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Kitsuneyama Kofun|en|Kitsuneyama Kofun|qid=Q17990344|lt=Koyama Kofun (Kaga)|1=Kitsuneyama Kofun}}
{{small|Kaga City, Ishikawa Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} 丸山塚古墳 (若狭町) 出土 横矧板鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Maruyama-zuka Kofun (Wakasa)|ja|丸山塚古墳 (若狭町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maruyama-zuka Kofun (Wakasa)|qq=}}
{{small|Wakasa Town, Fukui Prefecture. Photographed during an exhibition at the Hanazono University History Museum.}} 溝口の塚古墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Mizoguchi no Tsuka Kofun|ja|溝口の塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizoguchi no Tsuka Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Iida City, Nagano Prefecture. Exhibited at the Iida City Archaeological Museum.}} 青塚古墳 (城陽市) 出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Aotsuka Kofun (Jōyō)|ja|青塚古墳 (城陽市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aotsuka Kofun (Jōyō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{small|Joyo City, Kyoto Prefecture. Exhibited at the Kyoto Prefectural Yamashiro Local History Museum.}} 高井田山古墳出土 横矧板鋲留衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Takaidazan Kofun|ja|高井田山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaidazan Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Kashiwara City, Osaka Prefecture. Exhibited at the Kashiwara Municipal History Museum.}} 池尻2号墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Ikejiri Kofun No. 2|ja|池尻2号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikejiri Kofun No. 2|qq=}}
{{small|Kakogawa City, Hyōgo Prefecture. Exhibited at the Kakogawa Cultural Center Museum.}} 新沢千塚115号墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Niizawa Senchū Kofun No. 115|ja|新沢千塚115号墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niizawa Senchū Kofun No. 115|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
{{small|Kashihara City, Nara Prefecture. Exhibited at the Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute Museum.}} 江田船山古墳出土 衝角付冑 (J-731).JPG|Horned helmet from {{ill|Eta Funayama Kofun|en|Eta Funayama Kofun|qid=Q11259227|lt=Edafunayama Kofun|1=Eta Funayama Kofun}}
{{small|Nagusamachi, Kumamoto Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} 高霊池山洞32号墳出土 衝角付冑.JPG|Horned helmet from Gorye Pool Yokoanabo No. 32
{{small|Gorye County, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. Photographed during a special exhibition at the National Museum of Korean History and Folklore.}} === Others === いたすけ古墳 衝角付冑形埴輪.JPG|Horned helmet-shaped haniwa from {{ill|Itasuke Kofun|ja|いたすけ古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itasuke Kofun|qq=}}
{{small|Sakai City, Osaka Prefecture. Exhibited at the Sakai City Museum.}} 室宮山古墳出土 衝角付冑・盾形埴輪.JPG|Horned helmet and shield-shaped haniwa from {{ill|Muro Miyayama Kofun|en|Muro Miyayama Kofun|qid=Q11452994|lt=Muro Miyayama Kofun|1=Muro Miyayama Kofun}}
{{small|Gose City, Nara Prefecture. Exhibited at the Nara Prefectural Kashihara Archaeological Institute Museum.}} 西都原169号墳 衝角付冑形埴輪 (J-34665).JPG|Horned helmet-shaped haniwa from {{ill|Saitobaru Kofun Cluster|en|Saitobaru Kofun Cluster|qid=Q3469314|lt=Saitobaru Kofun No. 169|1=Saitobaru Kofun Cluster}}
{{small|Saito City, Miyazaki Prefecture. Exhibited at the Tokyo National Museum.}} == Notes == === Notes === {{Reflist|group=note}} === References === {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kabuto|en|Kabuto|qid=Q1720878|lt=Helmet|1=Kabuto}} * {{ill|Japanese armour|en|Japanese armour|qid=Q3671179|lt=Armor|1=Japanese armour}} * {{ill|Tankō|en|Tankō|qid=Q1687003|lt=Tankō|1=Tankō}} * {{ill|Lamellar armour|lt=Keikō (lamellar armour)|ja|挂甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lamellar armour|1=keikō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11077681}} * {{ill|Mabizashi helmet|ja|眉庇付冑|1=Helmet with Brow Plate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mabizashi helmet|13=User:Immanuelle/Helmet with Brow Plate|qq=}} * {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} {{考古学}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{translated page|ja|衝角付冑|version=104626670|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:衝角付冑]] {{wikidata link|Q48747987}} [[Category:Helmets]] [[Category:Kabuto]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Military history of Japan]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
